Title: User Registration with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User navigates to the registration page.
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
- Valid password: Test1234
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters the valid username, email, and password.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered, and the system sends a confirmation email.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Inputs
Preconditions: User navigates to the registration page.
Test Data:
- Invalid username: less than 3 characters
- Invalid email: invalid format
- Invalid password: less than 4 characters
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters the invalid username, email, and password.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message for each invalid input and prevents the registration.

Title: User Login with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is registered and has a valid account.
Test Data:
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
- Valid password: Test1234
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the valid email and password.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in, and the system redirects to the homepage.

Title: User Login with Invalid Inputs
Preconditions: User is registered and has a valid account.
Test Data:
- Invalid email: invalid format
- Invalid password: incorrect
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the invalid email and password.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message for each invalid input and prevents the login.

Title: Password Reset with Valid Inputs
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the password reset page.
2. User enters the valid email.
3. User clicks the "Reset Password" button.
Expected Result: The system sends a password reset email to the user.

Title: Password Reset with Invalid Inputs
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the password reset page.
2. User enters the invalid email.
3. User clicks the "Reset Password" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message for the invalid input and prevents the password reset.

Title: Card Loading with Valid Inputs
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the homepage.
2. The application loads 10 cards.
Expected Result: The application displays 10 cards on the homepage.

Title: Card Loading with Invalid Inputs
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the homepage.
2. The application loads the specified number of cards.
Expected Result: The application displays an error message for the invalid input and loads a default number of cards.

Title: Match Finding with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: Two users have swiped each other's cards.
Test Data:
- User 1 swipes right on User 2
- User 2 swipes right on User 1
Test Steps:
1. User 1 swipes right on User 2.
2. User 2 swipes right on User 1.
Expected Result: The system determines that there is a match between User 1 and User 2.

Title: Match Finding with Invalid Inputs
Preconditions: Two users have swiped each other's cards.
Test Data:
- User 1 swipes left on User 2
- User 2 swipes left on User 1
Test Steps:
1. User 1 swipes left on User 2.
2. User 2 swipes left on User 1.
Expected Result: The system determines that there is no match between User 1 and User 2.

Title: Sending and Receiving Messages
Preconditions: Two users are logged in and have each other's contact information.
Test Data:
- Sender: User 1
- Receiver: User 2
- Message: Hello!
Test Steps:
1. User 1 navigates to the chat page with User 2.
2. User 1 sends the message to User 2.
3. User 2 receives the message.
Expected Result: User 2 receives the message from User 1 and can respond.

Title: Sending and Receiving Invalid Messages
Preconditions: Two users are logged in and have each other's contact information.
Test Data:
- Sender: User 1
- Receiver: User 2
- Invalid message: empty string
Test Steps:
1. User 1 navigates to the chat page with User 2.
2. User 1 sends an empty message to User 2.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message and prevents the sending of the empty message.
